assertion_results.text: The review comment about transaction wrapping (id 30001) is classified as a code change request and triggers sub-task creation
assertion_results.evidence: review-30001.md states 'Classification: code change request' and 'Sub-task created (see subtask-30001.md).' The file subtask-30001.md exists in the outputs directory.

assertion_results.text: The review comment about adding an index (id 30002) is classified as a code change request (or upgraded suggestion) and triggers sub-task creation
assertion_results.evidence: review-30002.md states 'Classification: suggestion' and 'No sub-task created -- this is a suggestion without confirmed convention backing.' The comment was NOT classified as a code change request and no sub-task was created. No subtask-30002.md file exists in the outputs directory.

assertion_results.text: The nit comment about context message (id 30003) is classified as nit and does NOT trigger sub-task creation
assertion_results.evidence: review-30003.md states 'Classification: nit' and 'No sub-task created -- nit-level feedback does not trigger sub-task creation.' No subtask-30003.md file exists.

assertion_results.text: The question comment about GET behavior (id 30004) is classified as question and does NOT trigger sub-task creation
assertion_results.evidence: review-30004.md states 'Classification: question' and 'No sub-task created -- this is a question seeking clarification, not a code change request.' No subtask-30004.md file exists.

assertion_results.text: Each sub-task description follows the task-description-template.md format: contains Repository, Description, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, and Acceptance Criteria sections (constraint 1.12)
assertion_results.evidence: subtask-30001.md contains all required sections: '## Repository' (line 1), '## Description' (line 4), '## Files to Modify' (line 7), '## Implementation Notes' (line 10), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 16). This is the only sub-task file produced.

assertion_results.text: Each sub-task description includes a Target PR section with the PR URL https://github.com/trustify/trustify-backend/pull/744 (constraint 1.12)
assertion_results.evidence: subtask-30001.md contains '## Target PR' (line 25) followed by 'https://github.com/trustify/trustify-backend/pull/744' (line 26).

assertion_results.text: Each sub-task description includes a Review Context section with the original review comment text (constraint 1.12)
assertion_results.evidence: subtask-30001.md contains '## Review Context' (line 28) with reviewer ('reviewer-a'), file reference ('modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (line 60)'), and the full original comment text: 'The `soft_delete` method should run all three UPDATE statements inside a single database transaction...' (lines 29-31).

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT modify any code files — it only reads, verifies, creates sub-task descriptions, and reports (constraint 1.11)
assertion_results.evidence: The outputs directory contains only 6 files: report.md, review-30001.md, review-30002.md, review-30003.md, review-30004.md, and subtask-30001.md. All are report/classification/sub-task description files. No source code files (e.g., .rs, .py, .ts) were created or modified.

assertion_results.text: The skill reads and processes all PR review comments before generating findings (constraint 1.10)
assertion_results.evidence: All four review comments have individual classification files (review-30001.md through review-30004.md). The report.md Review Comment Summary table lists all four comments (30001, 30002, 30003, 30004) with their classifications and actions. The report header states '4 comments classified'.

assertion_results.text: The report does NOT auto-merge the PR (constraint 1.13)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md concludes with 'Overall: FAIL' and lists issues requiring attention. There is no mention of merging, auto-merging, or any merge action anywhere in the report or any output file.
